title: Agent OS Capability Map Refresh
goal: Implement #466 by refreshing docs/agent-os-capabilities.md against current planning, memory, workspace, optional-extension, and extraction-candidate boundaries.
non_goals: Do not turn the capability map into a backlog.
Do not rewrite the ecosystem architecture from scratch.
Do not create new modules in this slice.

intent.outcome: Capability categories match current architecture and product-shape intent.
intent.constraints: Keep bounded sequencing in state, not in the doctrine page.
intent.latitude: Update stale statements directly and route only bounded follow-up outside the doctrine page.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the refresh requires new package implementation or a broad roadmap rewrite.

execution.next_step: Promote #451 from the next roadmap lane after closing #466/#461.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selector, and planning doctor

invariants: Doctrine remains a capability taxonomy, not a queue.
Planning does not implicitly own adjacent optional capabilities.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #461: make Agentic Planning smaller by default and clearer by boundary.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: After #466, validate whether #461 can close or whether a narrow residue remains.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #466 closeout, run summary/proof and decide whether to close #461

parent_lane.title: Reclassify planning payload into core, optional extensions, and extraction candidates

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: docs/agent-os-capabilities.md now reflects the smaller planning core, explicit optional extensions, extraction candidates, and maintainer-only generated-surface trust boundary.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: feature-tier and broader product-shape compression continue under #450/#451.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: #461 can close after #466 because every child acceptance item has landed.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning-surface check, maintainer-surfaces, proof selector, and planning doctor passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: close #466 and #461, refresh external evidence, then continue #451.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Refresh the Agent OS capability map against current module boundaries.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not create a backlog inside docs/agent-os-capabilities.md.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording changes that align doctrine with current package boundaries.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The capability map implies new package work that lacks issue-backed scope.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #461/#466, docs/agent-os-capabilities.md, packages/planning/extraction-candidates.json, module registry
context_budget.externalize before shift: record whether #461 can close after doctrine refresh
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #466 capability-map refresh.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before creating any new issue or changing roadmap priority.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Make the long-horizon doctrine reflect smaller planning boundaries without creating new ordinary surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can #461 close after doctrine matches the current payload and extraction boundaries?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to doctrine refresh and parent-lane closure decision.

immediate_next_action: Update stale capability categories and role text without adding backlog semantics.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
Route bounded follow-up to issues or state, not doctrine prose.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/agent-os-capability-map-refresh.plan.json docs/agent-os-capabilities.md packages/planning/extraction-candidates.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Capability categories match current architecture and product-shape intent.
Planning no longer implicitly owns capabilities only because the old map placed them near planning.
Any new bounded work is routed outside the doctrine page.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Refreshed docs/agent-os-capabilities.md with a current planning boundary snapshot, updated category stances for bounded delegated judgment, intake, review/audit, external work reconciliation, reporting/signal, and generated-surface trust, and kept extraction criteria evidence-driven.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; make maintainer-surfaces; proof selector; planning doctor.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: docs/agent-os-capabilities.md now carries the refreshed doctrine; packages/planning/extraction-candidates.json remains the package-local evidence map.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #462 classified payloads, #463 shrank default install, #464 added explicit optional enablement, #465 defined extraction candidates, and #466 refreshed doctrine.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Capability doctrine now matches current module and payload boundaries.
closure_check.reopen trigger: docs/agent-os-capabilities.md again implies planning owns optional or extraction-candidate capabilities by inertia

discard.summary: No additional doctrine follow-up was created; #450/#451 already own feature-tier compression.

continuation.summary: Close #466 and #461, refresh external evidence, then promote #451.

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted after #465 added package-local extraction candidates.
2026-04-27: Refreshed capability map against current planning core, optional extensions, extraction candidates, and maintainer-only generated-surface trust boundaries.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Refresh the capability map against current planning, memory, workspace, and emerging optional/extraction boundaries.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: docs/agent-os-capabilities.md now names the current planning boundary snapshot and updates the affected capability categories and promotion stances.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q passed with 179 tests; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests passed; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py passed; make maintainer-surfaces passed; proof selector selected maintainer/planning surfaces; planning doctor was healthy.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: The changed doctrine page, active state, and execplan surfaces validate through the selected maintainer and planning lanes.
